message:
fix(stream): add completed guards to terminal stream combinators

Any, All, Collect, Count, ForEach, and TryStream combinators are
Future types that resolve to a single value when the underlying stream
ends. Polling these futures after they return Ready violates the
Future contract and could re-enter stream iteration on a closed stream.

Each combinator now tracks a `completed` flag and asserts on re-poll,
catching misuse immediately rather than producing incorrect results
or silently polling an exhausted stream.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
